# lots

```go
import "github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/pkg/lots"
```

Package lots calculates Arabic lots \(also called parts\), which are sensitive points derived from the Ascendant and two planet longitudes. The package includes 15\+ traditional lots such as the Part of Fortune, Part of Spirit, and Part of Eros.

CalcStandardLots computes all built\-in lots for a chart. CalcCustomLot allows arbitrary lot formulas with optional day/night reversal.

## Index

  - [func CalcStandardLots\(positions \[\]models.PlanetPosition, asc float64, isDayChart bool\) \[\]LotResult](<#CalcStandardLots>)

```go
func CalcCustomLot(asc, lonA, lonB float64, isDayChart, reverseAtNight bool) float64
```

CalcCustomLot computes a custom Arabic lot: ASC \+ bodyA \- bodyB

<a name="LotResult"></a>
## type [LotResult](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/lots/lots.go#L11-L17>)

LotResult holds a calculated Arabic lot/part

```go
type LotResult struct {
    Name      string  `json:"name"`
    Longitude float64 `json:"longitude"`
    Sign      string  `json:"sign"`
    SignDeg   float64 `json:"sign_degree"`
    Formula   string  `json:"formula"`
}
```
